description: Proactive Scheduling - Background task that checks deadlines and sends escalating notifications, plus a Cloud Scheduler trigger endpoint and WebSocket push for real-time notifications.
steps: Create backend/app/scheduler/proactive.py: Background task using asyncio that runs every 30 minutes. On each tick, query all users from Firestore, check their tasks/deadlines. If deadline within 24h: gentle reminder. Within 6h: urgent reminder with action suggestion. Within 1h: critical - offer to reschedule or provide completion help. Store a set of connected WebSocket clients to push notifications. Export start_proactive_scheduler() and stop_proactive_scheduler() functions.

Create backend/app/scheduler/nudge_engine.py: Escalation logic module. Given a task and its time_until_deadline, generate a context-aware nudge message using Gemini. Functions: generate_nudge(task, urgency_level) -> str that calls Gemini with a system prompt describing escalation rules, classify_urgency(deadline: datetime) -> str returning 'gentle'|'urgent'|'critical'.

Add REST endpoint POST /api/nudge/trigger in backend/app/main.py that triggers a manual nudge check for all users (or optionally a specific user_id query param). This endpoint is what Cloud Scheduler calls in production. Protect it with a simple API key check (add SCHEDULER_API_KEY to config).

Add WebSocket push mechanism: maintain a dict of user_id -> list[WebSocket] in main.py (or a separate connection manager module). When proactive.py generates a notification, push it to connected clients. Add a ConnectionManager class that tracks active WebSocket connections by user_id.
Update backend/app/main.py lifespan to start the proactive scheduler background task on startup and stop it on shutdown.
Update backend/app/config.py to add SCHEDULER_API_KEY field and NUDGE_INTERVAL_MINUTES (default 30).
Create docs/CLOUD_SCHEDULER_SETUP.md with instructions for setting up Google Cloud Scheduler to call POST /api/nudge/trigger every 30 minutes with the API key header.
acceptance_criteria: backend/app/scheduler/proactive.py exists with a periodic background task that checks deadlines
backend/app/scheduler/nudge_engine.py exists with urgency classification and Gemini-powered nudge generation
POST /api/nudge/trigger endpoint exists and is protected by API key
WebSocket connections are tracked by user_id for push notifications
docs/CLOUD_SCHEDULER_SETUP.md exists with clear setup instructions
Python imports work: python -c 'from app.scheduler.proactive import start_proactive_scheduler; from app.scheduler.nudge_engine import generate_nudge, classify_urgency'
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/ChronAI/backend && python -c 'from app.scheduler.proactive import start_proactive_scheduler, stop_proactive_scheduler; from app.scheduler.nudge_engine import generate_nudge, classify_urgency; print("Scheduler imports OK")'
cd /projects/sandbox/ChronAI/backend && python -c 'from app.main import app; print("App with scheduler OK")'
